name: Ermano D. Cayard
identity: Systems-minded IT professional applying governance, operational awareness, and maintainable architecture to support, automation, and AI-enabled knowledge work.
summary: I turn operational friction into structured workflows, documentation, and public-safe systems evidence. My work centers on maintainability, blast-radius awareness, and practical governance.

approach.title: Governance first
approach.body: Tools only help when the ownership, review path, and operating rules are clear. I look for the control model before the feature list.

approach.title: Build for change
approach.body: A useful system should survive the next requirement. I prefer small, stable structures that can absorb change without becoming fragile.

approach.title: Know the blast radius
approach.body: Before changing a workflow, I ask what can break, who is affected, and how to contain the risk. Quiet systems are designed to fail smaller.
